title: Children's perceptions of factors enhancing play value and inclusion on outdoor playgrounds: a synthesis of qualitative evidence
author: Wenger, Ines
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The protocol describes the review question, search strategy, and inclusion and exclusion criteria for a synthesis of qualitative evidence about children's perceptions of factors enhancing play value and inclusion on outdoor playgrounds. Furthermore, it contains information about the planned data extraction process, quality assessment, and data synthesis procedure.
steps_raw: The protocol describes the review question, search strategy, and inclusion and exclusion criteria for a synthesis of qualitative evidence about children's perceptions of factors enhancing play value and inclusion on outdoor playgrounds. Furthermore, it contains information about the planned data extraction process, quality assessment, and data synthesis procedure.
